choices.text: Falls (~33% fatalities, #1), Struck-by (vehicles/objects), Caught-in/between (trenches/machinery), Electrocution. Fall protection required 6+ ft. Trench protection 5+ ft.
Elimination > Substitution > Engineering controls > Administrative > PPE (last line). Most effective at top. Many programs over-rely on PPE alone.
Fatality within 8 hours; hospitalization/amputation/eye loss within 24 hours. Phone 1-800-321-OSHA. Mandatory. Penalties for delay or failure.
Total Recordable Incident Rate = (recordable incidents × 200,000) / hours worked. Industry average ~3.0; best contractors <1.0. Required by clients + insurance for prequalification.
LOTO (Lockout/Tagout): isolate energy + lock + tag with worker identifier + verify zero energy + only locking worker removes. Required for electrical/mechanical maintenance. OSHA-regulated.
